test_notification_tooltip: The test will be sent to the email address you configured in settings.
test_notification_sent_description: A test of "{title}" has been sent
notification_at_least_one_channel_requir: You must select at least one delivery channel
confirm_activate_notification_message: Are you sure you want to activate "{title}"?
confirm_deactivate_notification_message: Are you sure you want to disable "{title}"?
notification_activate_info_message: You will start receiving these notifications automatically.
notification_deactivate_info_message: You will stop receiving these notifications until you turn them back on.
notifications_welcome_description: Initial welcome that presents the value of the platform (“AI that works for you”).
notifications_config_reminder_descriptio: Reminder to complete pending information that was left out of the onboarding.
notifications_password_recovery_descript: It allows you to securely recover your password when you forget it.
notifications_success_activation_descrip: Confirm that your account has been successfully activated and is ready to use.
notifications_activation_reminder_descri: It reminds you to activate your account before your trial period ends.
notifications_catalog_reminder_title: Notification that the catalog has not been uploaded
notifications_catalog_reminder_descripti: It warns that you need to upload your catalog in order to activate and send campaigns.
notifications_first_ai_post_description: It shows you how your catalog connects with the content that Linda automatically generates.
notifications_faqs_confirmation_descript: Confirm that your FAQs are active to improve your customers' experience.
notifications_first_contact_description: Celebrate creating your first client and confirm that the system is now operational.
notifications_create_contact_reminder_ti: Reminder: No contacts have been created yet.
notifications_create_contact_reminder_de: It reminds you to create your first contact and explains why it's important to activate all the features.
notifications_contact_advise_description: It explains that when you create your first client, the CRM, campaigns, and Linda are automatically activated.
notifications_test_suggestion_descriptio: It invites you to try the notifications to see what the messages Linda will send to your customers will look like.
notifications_test_sent_description: Confirm that you received the proof and show real examples of customization.
notifications_linda_post_description: Linda suggests new content for you to publish.
notifications_first_campaign_description: It notifies you that your first campaign is ready and invites you to try it.
notifications_campaign_sent_description: Confirm that your campaign was successfully sent to all recipients.
notifications_campaign_failed_descriptio: It notifies you when a campaign could not be sent and what you can do to fix it.
notifications_new_lead_description: It notifies you when you receive a new lead and shows how Linda learns from each interaction.
notifications_help_linda_description: It tells you when Linda detects missing information and how you can help her improve her answers.
notifications_insights_discover_descript: It shows you automatic insights about your audience and how segmentation helps you improve your campaigns.
notifications_freetrial_reminder_15_desc: It reminds you that there are 15 days left in your trial and invites you to continue exploring all the features.
notifications_freetrial_reminder_7_descr: It tells you that there are 7 days of trial left and reinforces the value you will get by continuing.
notifications_freetrial_reminder_1_descr: Final notice: your trial ends tomorrow. You are invited to convert before it ends.
notifications_finish_process_description: Celebrate that you completed the onboarding and get a preview of the next steps to continue growing.
notifications_finish_process_2_descripti: It celebrates the completion of your trial period and shows you how to continue taking advantage of the platform.
notifications_tips_post_onboarding_descr: It shares tips and best practices to help you continue to take full advantage of all the features.
notifications_ret_auto_description: Automatic notification generated by the system for responses and returns.
notifications_demo_campaign_test_descrip: Notification sent to customers when a demo campaign test is performed to verify the system's functionality.
